entries.concept_hook: A former circus strongman turned illegal underground fighter who uses his freakishly elongated limbs and uncanny flexibility to defeat opponents who expect him to be slow and predictable.
entries.narrative_role: The reluctant monster — a gentle man forced into violence to pay his sister's medical debts, whose unnatural proportions make others assume he's a mindless brute, when he's actually a strategic manipulator who turns his body into a weapon
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Draws from the Elephant Man narrative with circus strongman aesthetics and stretches limbs like a praying mantis

entries.concept_hook: A deadly South Asian poison master who uses exotic toxins and psychological manipulation to dismantle opponents from the inside out
entries.narrative_role: The scheming strategist who makes opponents question their own resolve before she ever touches them
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Poison ivy from DC meets classic Bollywood femme fatale
entries.face_adornment: serpentine face chain with ruby eyes

entries.concept_hook: A young Mexican prodigy with preternatural reflexes who fights with bullfighting-inspired showmanship and devastating precision
entries.narrative_role: The arrogant rising star who underestimates cunning opponents and learns painful lessons about hubris
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Young Miguel Rojo from Bloodrayne meets cocky martial arts movie protagonist
